Shardtooth's Flayed Skin  
 

Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 14
HP: +35 MANA: +35 ENDUR: +35
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except CLR DRU MNK SHM BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Shardtooth's Flayed Skin
Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 14
HP: +35 MANA: +35 ENDUR: +35
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except CLR DRU MNK SHM BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Leather
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:20 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:60
Submitted By:Devastation Ravager
Lucy Entry By:Agamenoar
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:57:16
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 500pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 44
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Great Divide
NPC Name
Shardtooth

Great Divide


Uploaded December 19th, 2022 by iventheassassin

« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 03 2005 at 12:46 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Mmmmm Breasts,,,,
#iganias, Posted: Jun 04 2005 at 9:57 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) that guy is gay
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 25 2003 at 7:42 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Man, I wonder why they go for 100-250pp... That seems cheap for some reason. I know that it could also be servers. But I mean I would say at least 500pp for every server... Call me Crazy but this is a good item for a lvl 40-45 mob. That is the lvls where good loot comes into play but DANG. 35hp 35mana. Seems like some casters would be willing to pay at least 500pp for these
Great chest peice
QuoteReply
# Aug 09 2002 at 10:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758106980
222 posts
Got this one on my dark elf chanter - with a pair of trak leggings, she's got this great leather/********** look to her - great for getting folks who are just browsing to come on over to her in the bazaar.

The hitpoints, AC and mana definately work wonders at the lower levels - I'm still wearing this at 22 and probobly will for some time - INT won't really help you for anything but tradeskills till post 30th.

Best part about these is that they run for under 100plat in the bazaar because everyone thinks they need INT.
▲ Page top
RE: Great chest peice
QuoteReply
# Mar 17 2004 at 3:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758121968
53 posts
heh, youglings. I'm here to tell ya that this tunic is AWESOME at higher levels. It is not just a twink item. When you get beyond level 40, and you start to discover that you can get items with 10-20 INT on your EARS, you start to appreciate the value of +MANA and +HP items, as your int quickly maxes out, no matter what your starting int is. As a higher level wizard, I tend to focus on HP, AC, and MANA. I have actually stood up to Naggy in my current gear and lasted about 45 seconds with no heals (MT died and naggy went after the person who had the most aggro... never mind that wizzy throwing 200+ dps ;oP )
▲ Page top
RE: Great chest peice
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2003 at 4:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362644179
52 posts
Your a rong, enchanter do need INT for the mana, the more INT you have the more mana you have.

Just thought i would say that
▲ Page top
RE: Great chest peice
QuoteReply
# Dec 18 2002 at 11:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246071439
19 posts
Where did you get trak leggings? I did a search, and only warriors and such can wear the only ones I found. Can you give me the correct name, or a link? I am trying to finish out my outfit. I have the chest piece.

Thanks

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 13 2002 at 2:12 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I have one on Karana that i would like to sell for
Not fair :(
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2002 at 12:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252678401

Damn this thing isn't druid usable? too bad, cause a female wizard showed it off to me and she was so hot. hehe, was planning to get it for my druid friend but oh well. Win some, lose some, :P
▲ Page top
washed out
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2002 at 9:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777012720
3 posts
i have worn this on my HIE chanty up to lvl 39, i loved the look it gave me a washed out herion addict look when all the other casters looked like they should be washing your hair for you. it breaks my heart to let it go but even worse,i wear the dress now 8(
▲ Page top
It's not worth 2k!
QuoteReply
# Apr 10 2002 at 10:40 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592759153693
4 posts
I've been trying to sell this item for over a week. I've had no luck. I've ranged the price from 250pp to 500pp based on the price information given at this web site. Nobody wants it. It was a great deal for 30pp off of the Shady vender. The stats are nice, but it does have the n00b skin which looks lame. Any way it's wearable by pure casters which is a good bonus, but not priest classes. Actually, the only classes that have inquired about the item when auctioned were druids and shamans.

Edited, Wed Apr 10 11:43:31 2002
▲ Page top
They go for..
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2003 at 10:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255191429
22 posts
On Quellious and Terris Thule I see them all the time for 20-50 pp each. Notice that this is in bazaar, post PoP.

That being said, I have one that I switch between my new chars, they wear them until 20-25 usually, until I switch to nicer Int gear with resists. A good replacement for this is the Froglok Bonecaster's Robe, which can be had for about 2k usually - sometimes up to 4.
▲ Page top
Interesting...
QuoteReply
# Feb 23 2002 at 1:44 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591764843682
169 posts
Seems to me that the Shady Swashbuckler can come up with some damn good deals. I bought this from him for 25 plat. Was thinking on twinking a new necro I was thinking about. Surprised to see what some people are willing to offer for this. It is a great item for casters, damn good ac, mana and HP adds are sweet as well. Granted, it dont have saves or any other stat buffs, but hey! Thats what the other slots are for right? Chose and make up yer own set of gear you come across that you think will work for you. I always run by and check on those venders in the EC Tunnel Mart and the occasional guy who has bags of stuf to sell. You never know and be pleasently surprised at what ye may find. I like that aspect, seing new stuf, how much they go for, and maybe getting a good deal on gear. Sometimes it sure beats trying to wiggle yer way into a camp for it, saves a lot of time!
▲ Page top

# Jan 11 2002 at 8:24 PM Rating: Decent

8 posts
I bought his from a vendor in OT for 41pp...lucked out i guess

▲ Page top
Great Caster Item
QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2001 at 12:55 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591760552839
10 posts
I think that it is a great item, even for Int Caster. Why ? well, even at mid-hi level, 1 Int point give you 7mana pts. 1 Sta point dont even give you so much HP (1 for 4 ?). And few robes give you so much AC.

So i think, nowaday, tat this armor is under coted. IMO it is more valuable than a lot of robes. and leather look is nice too :)

At final, what need a caster ? Mana, HP, and resists. Way to obtain mana (Int or Mana pure) is secondary :)
▲ Page top
RE: Great Caster Item
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2002 at 12:03 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761913405
67 posts
At mid-levels one would probably have a robe with a combination of INT and direct mana. Advisor Robe (8ac 5int 20mana 5svMagic) provides a larger mana pool once you get 4 or more mana from a point of INT, though it lacks the AC and HPs.

But for a newbie caster who doesn't get much mana from INT yet, this rocks. And the HPs alone will just about double the total HPs of a level one character.
▲ Page top
RE: Great Caster Item
QuoteReply
# Apr 25 2002 at 12:37 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592758270846
26 posts
This robe has +6 AC +35 HP +15 more direct mana. Gives up 5 int and 5 svMagic.

I would take this one over the Advisor robe, even if I had a 200 int.

#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 22 2001 at 9:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I have one for sale on lany's TVL server give malchite a tell
not worth much

# Aug 30 2001 at 7:52 PM Rating: Good

It sells on The Tribunal for 200-400pp. Its nice for a caster with 200 INT but a robe is one of the best stat items for a caster too so its hard to find a buyer.

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 07 2001 at 2:03 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) One of these dropped last night when we killed Shardtooth. This is a decent druid item. It makes no sense at all that they cant use. It seems like a vicious joke: the only class that would really use the item cant. What is the point? No I am not a druid.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 10 2001 at 2:01 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You loose spell effects when you die while zoning. This will typically happen
RE: Re: why you lose spell effects on zoning
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2001 at 2:46 PM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
126 posts
Actually, when this happens is when you zone with fewer hitpoints than the hitpoints added by your armor. So in effect you do die because the armor hp drop off at zone then come back on the other side.

Lets say you have on 2 55hp rings. you zone with sow and 25hp. Upon entering the zone the ring hp drop taking your hp to zero, in effect killing you and taking away your buffs, yet when you zone in, the rings take effect again giving you 110 hp instead of 25 hp when you get to the other side and you nolonger have sow.

It is a pretty good trade off unless you are one of those melee types who wait way too long to zone and dont have the ability to rebuff because you had that very nice shaman mojo all over you, but she is now long gone and you are back to dukeing it out with your normal bad self.

▲ Page top
Great for Mid Level Mage
QuoteReply
# May 01 2001 at 4:30 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I just bought this robe for 400PP. As a level 24 Mage it was nearly impossible to find anything in a reasonable price range that was even worth buying. The big plus is this gets me out of those ugly dresses. Im tired of looking like a bad drag queen. The look is very cool. On top of the +35 mana, I get +35 HP, which at my level translates to a little extra time to run like heck, not to mention the AC 14. This is great for mid level mages!
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 07 2001 at 9:36 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I have found that when I zone with less than 100hp and like poison diseas or any spell effects at all, after I zone I have 100 hp and all spell effects are gone. This only happends when wearing this piece of equipment.
RE: something new
QuoteReply
# Apr 13 2001 at 2:08 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248168937
18 posts
I have noticed that when im wearing this and i have 5hp and im poisoned, and diseased i get an awsome spell called "teleport to bind location".
Actually, i have noticed that when i have less than 100hp and am poisoned and diseased, when i zone my str goes +40 and my hp goes +220 and my ac +120 and my mana goes FULL. - lies.



Bishnuts Bastage -E'Ci (Twink Central)
31 seasons of punting dwarfs,gnomes and halflings.
▲ Page top
Yay! Yet another pointless flame!
QuoteReply
# May 03 2001 at 8:23 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Actually smartass, a month or so ago I went through a phase where all my negative spells effects (poison/disease) would be removed upon zoning. Fighting gnolls in Lake Rathe my poison and disease spells that the shaman had hit me with would dissappear when I zoned, likewise with Drahcnid poison when zoning from FV.
I assumed it was a friendly bug. I haven't noticed it since so I assume its been fixed.
So dont accuse people of lying when you dont have all the facts yourself. He merely jumped to the wrong conclusion.
▲ Page top
Correct information
QuoteReply
# May 10 2001 at 11:22 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Actually, the way this "bug" seems to work is :
When you zone with few hit points, been beaten up by some mobs, you sometimes lose ALL the spell effects there were on you. Good (buffs) and bad ones (poisons & diseases) alike. It happened a lot with me some weeks ago, zoning out of Crushbone with legos on me and less than 20% health. The same thing occured 2 times in HPH with orcs.

QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2001 at 10:09 PM Rating: Default

Anonymous
WHY THE HECK are druid taken out of this, this is leather we wear leather for a dang long time why not this??
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 30 2001 at 12:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why do druids complaign about every item that they can't use. There are items that every class can't use for game balance reasons. Sit down and be quite, Youe class is already the most pampwered in the game.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 06 2001 at 3:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) HAHAHAHAHAHAHA, game balance. You think that game is balanced? Start playing a ranger, we actually have to spend time farming equipment in our mid levels so we have enough money to buy equipment that makes us half as good as any other class. And now especially on rallos zek(where i play my 43 ranger and hunt down pks then leave cause i am starting to dislike the game), resist debuffs doing 150%, what do verants pk's have a hard time killing melee's or something? That so unbalanced it once again as we were all finally getting good very good resist equipment to put us over 100 in every stat instead of 200mr, 150fr, 150cr, 40pr, 40dr, or something like that. Don't even start talking about balancing, verant is the worst at that. You can tell the head guys just wanted to play a necro and druid.
RE: the second poster
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2001 at 12:29 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750605686
55 posts
Rangers can solo pretty well actually, you just gotta stick to animals. In fact you're the only hybrid that can solo effectively, all the way to 50 if you want. I know people who have. No, you can't solo nearly as easily as a Druid or Necro, but still easier than most other classes.

This is fabulous for casters with 200 Int from items other than the chest slot. Lets them look like Leahter armor wearers, and is great AC and + Hits and mana.

I got a buddy who is a 50 Wiz and he picked up one of these after he got Fruity Boots to push his Int to 206. He dropped his old robe and got this and still has a 201 Int and now better ac hits and mana still.
